case.title: FEDERAL SAVINGS AND LOAN v. BOWERS

opinion.h4: FEDERAL SAVINGS AND LOAN v. BOWERS, (1959)
SECOND FEDERAL SAVINGS AND LOAN ASSOCIATION OF CLEVELAND v. BOWERS, TAX COMMISSIONER OF OHIO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 537. Decided January 19, 1959.
opinion.p: William Saxbe, Attorney General of Ohio, and John M. Tobin, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE HARLAN is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
